must_detect.matched_text: Regulatory framing: references align to Corporations law concepts and the Sydney Listing Exchange (SLE) guidance under continuous disclosure principles, with oversight by the Corporate Markets Authority (CMA) (both fictional).

uncertain.reason: ISINs can be sensitive instrument identifiers but are not included in the allowed rule set here.
Internal token/test code may indicate a DPT/crypto asset but there is no specific allowed rule for such identifiers.

_label_note: AU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered AU public switchboard/reception/role-mailbox contact bait, ACT-vs-Act postal-address false positives, negated material-adverse-change trigger prose, and checksum-valid TFN/ABN/ACN positives. Generated placeholder/dummy ABN/ACN/TFN labels were removed from strict must_detect.

_agent_review.notes: Reconciled AU Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, AU TFN/ABN/ACN checksum issues, public switchboard/reception/role-mailbox contact bait, ACT-vs-Act postal false positives, and negated material-adverse-change wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled AU Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, AU TFN/ABN/ACN checksum issues, public switchboard/reception/role-mailbox contact bait, ACT-vs-Act postal false positives, and negated material-adverse-change wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_human_review.notes: Project owner approved AU Stage A for internal/project benchmarking based on Codex/GPT-assisted review; not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal approval.
